title: 50 TidyZ Heavy-Duty Black Bin Bags. Made from 100% Recycled Plastic. Extra Strong Refuse Sacks with Tie Handles. 50L. For Kitchen, Office and General Household Waste
features: HEAVY DUTY & EXTRA STRONG - Premium thickness for kitchen, office, garden, household waste
CONVENIENT TIE HANDLES - Bags are easily tied, carried, and disposed of using the handy tie handles
MADE FROM 100% RECYCLED PLASTIC - With recycled plastic that would have otherwise been destined for landfill!
LEAKPROOF & TEAR RESISTANT - Suitable for daily household jobs and heavy-duty tasks in and around the home

50L CAPACITY - Perfect for all DIY and Daily Household Tasks - Kitchen Swing Bin Clearance Storage and Removal. Huge roll of 50 Dustbin liners, for General Waste and to line your Kitchen Bin, Storage, Office & all your household needs
description: Product Description 50 Extra Strong Tie Handle Bin Bags for Home, Kitchen and Office Introducing our heavy-duty, 100% recycled plastic bin bags with convenient tie handles. These 50L capacity bags are leakproof and tear-resistant, perfect for kitchen, office, and household waste. Each roll contains 50 strong bags, ideal for all your disposal needs. Experience the reliability of our eco-friendly, versatile bin bags. Convenient Tie Handles Quick-seal handles make tying and carrying effortless. No more wrestling with loose bags or messy spills. Extra Strong Heavy-duty thickness prevents tears and leaks, even with sharp objects, wet waste, or heavy loads. 100% Recycled & Recyclable Made entirely from recycled plastic and fully recyclable. Reduce waste without compromising on strength or reliability. Versatile & Practical Perfect for kitchen bins, office waste, bathrooms, and general household rubbish. One bag for every room. Value and Quality in one BIG Roll! Get exceptional value with TidyZ Heavy-Duty Black Bin Bags—50 extra-strong bags that handle your toughest waste with ease. Each 50-litre bag is made from 100% recycled plastic, features convenient tie handles, and boasts extra-thick construction that won't tear or leak. Perfect for kitchen bins, offices, and general household use, these bags prove you don't have to choose between strength and sustainability. Trusted by British households for reliable, guilt-free waste disposal.
